advancements.the_collector.root.title: The Collector
advancements.the_collector.root.descript: Follow the traces of what should not have been taken.
advancements.the_collector.something_is_: You are certain you left it here.
advancements.the_collector.relics_of_the: Some creatures carry pieces of a forgotten mechanism.
advancements.the_collector.echo_in_the_d: Something beneath the world remembers the passage.
advancements.the_collector.forging_the_c: Three forces united awaken the dormant stone.
advancements.the_collector.the_stone_lis: The door does not open for those who stand proud.
advancements.the_collector.the_door_betw: You have crossed where few have dared.
advancements.the_collector.the_collector: A vault filled with the weight of forgotten lives.
advancements.the_collector.a_hidden_stas: The stolen things must be stored somewhere.
item.the_collector.unstable_resonance.lo: A bottled trace-fluid, still writhing with the Collector's passage.
item.the_collector.resonant_residue.lore: What remains once the distilled fluid has crystallized at rest.
item.the_collector.distilled_resonance.l: A refined fluid that slowly crystallizes if left undisturbed.
item.the_collector.attuned_resonance.lor: The energy now reacts to dimensional disturbances.
item.the_collector.resonance_crystal.lor: A crystal that vibrates with the Collector's presence.
item.the_collector.resonance_ladle.not_r: The cauldron needs %s more seconds to crystallize.
block.the_collector.alembic.missing_mate: You need the matching reagent and blaze powder.
item.the_collector.collector_compass.no_: No collector stash is known yet.
item.the_collector.collector_compass.cro: That stash is in another dimension.
item.the_collector.collector_catalyst.no: This block is not a Collector entry.
item.the_collector.collector_catalyst.in: Ritual incomplete: place 4 Crying Obsidian (cross) and 4 Soul Lanterns around the entry.
item.the_collector.collector_catalyst.ac: Collector gate activated. Survive the backlash.
command.the_collector.entry.none: No entry to the Collector realm exists yet.
command.the_collector.entry.created: New entry generated: X=%s Y=%s Z=%s
command.the_collector.spawn.player_only: This command must be run by a player.
command.the_collector.spawn.static_succe: Static Collector spawned at X=%s Y=%s Z=%s
dimension.the_collector.no_entry: No valid exit entry was found.
dimension.the_collector.entry_inactive: Entry is unstable. Activate it with a ritual Catalyst.
lore.the_collector.page.lost_leaf.1: People say it steals gold, gems, and relics out of greed. They are wrong. The Collector does not crave wealth, but weight.
lore.the_collector.page.lost_leaf.2: Some possessions keep the mark of their owner, as if hands, battles, and vows leave behind an invisible soot. It takes what still resonates.
lore.the_collector.page.lost_leaf.3: I followed one of its stashes to a guiding stone buried in old ruins. My compass circled it like an insect around cold fire. It was not a stash. It was a shut mouth.
lore.the_collector.page.surveyor_journal: I found three of those stones where its tracks ended abruptly. Always the same feeling: something watching from behind the world.
On the first night I mistook it for an altar. On the second, for a tomb. On the third, I saw the arrangement: four dark stones that seemed to weep around the core.
Farther out, at the height of a man, four soul flames guarded the winds like sentries. I did not understand yet, but I had already copied the sketch.
lore.the_collector.page.scholar_note.1: The Collector does not build a kingdom. It feeds one. Every stolen object nourishes a place where rarity, memory, and absence gather.
lore.the_collector.page.scholar_note.2: The entry stones remain inert unless one returns a shard of what it seeks. Fragments from the deep, the ancient fire, and the echo answer most readily.
lore.the_collector.page.scholar_note.3: Bound together, they yield an unstable catalyst. Yet those who used it spoke of an immediate price: risen bones, a gaze from the dark, and pain carried in the blood.
lore.the_collector.page.final_page.1: I attempted the rite at dusk: four stones in a cross around the heart, and four soul lanterns set beyond them facing the cardinal winds.
lore.the_collector.page.final_page.2: Then I pressed the catalyst against the guiding stone. A groan answered me. The stone awakened, yet nothing opened while I stood there like a fool.
lore.the_collector.page.final_page.3: Only when I lowered myself, almost as if in submission, did the passage take hold of me. I glimpsed a chamber built to store the world's regrets.
